shortDescription: Stylish 2-bedroom freehold townhouse in Pape Village with three levels of living space.
fullDescription: Welcome to 995 Danforth Avenue in the vibrant Pape Village neighbourhood. This stylish multi-level townhouse provides the space of a house with the convenience of condo living. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
Cosy living room with gas fireplace
Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
